title: Add CLI `create-tasks` and `search-context` commands
implementation_notes: Edit cli/relayhq.ts to add two new commands.
Reads a JSON file containing an array of task proposals (see subtask_01 for TaskProposal shape).
Prints: for each created task — '✓ Created: {title} [{id}]'
Exits 0 if at least one task created. Exits 1 if all tasks failed/errored.
On empty results: prints 'No results for: {query}'
acceptance_criteria: `bun run ./cli/relayhq.ts create-tasks --file tasks.json` creates tasks and prints per-task outcome.
`bun run ./cli/relayhq.ts search-context 'nothingmatches'` prints 'No results' without error.
No changes to existing command behaviour.
completion_summary: Added CLI `create-tasks` and `search-context` commands so the planner lane can work through RelayHQ without manual HTTP calls.
